description.value: Benefit: When applied to a technique, double the range it gains per two levels (For example, a technique with Long range gets a range of 30ft. + 30ft./two levels). If the technique has a maximum range, it is not increased. Increase the Perform Requirements by 2, and the Chakra Cost by 1 per 2 Ranks of the technique (rounded up).
